## Checklist

- [ ] Targets `main` (release-ready) or `dev` (in progress).
- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check` passes.
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings` passes.
- [ ] `cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml` passes.
- [ ] No new dependencies, or a short justification is in the description.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or internal hostnames committed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `Unreleased` if user-facing.
